# Input

**Associated Type**

The kind of values this subscriber receives.

## Declaration

```swift
associatedtype Input
```

## Declaring supporting types

- **Failure**: The kind of errors this subscriber might receive.

items.description: The kind of errors this subscriber might receive.
items.name: Failure

title: Input
